_description: Reference: sys-geo-schema-injector (W7.2) — head-injection extension that emits Schema.org JSON-LD into every rendered page's `<head>`. 6 schema types (Article, Product, FAQPage, Event + universal BreadcrumbList, Organization). Per-tenant defaults via `content_settings.extensions.schema_defaults`; per-page overrides via the standard page metadata.
_no_block_needed: Head-injection extension activates automatically when schema_defaults.enabled=true. Per-page schema fields are read from the existing page.metadata JSON.

_per_page_metadata_shape._note: Set on individual pages via content_pages.metadata JSON.
